Name: search_news_aggregate
SQL: WITH "_root.base" AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM "public"."search_news"($1) AS "_fn_search_news" WHERE "_fn_search_news"."is_public" = $2::bool) SELECT json_build_object('aggregate', (SELECT json_build_object('count', COUNT(*)) FROM "_root.base")) AS "search_news_aggregate"
